description: Style Note jeans from spykar floors us with the flattering Fit and amazing comfort that it has to offer. Easily styled and soon to become your wardrobe favourite, pair this pair with a flowy tunic and flat sandals for a pretty and chic look. Product Details Dark blue washed jeans, has a high waist, stretch, wrinkled look on the waistband and on the pockets, button and zipped closure, belt loops around the waistband, brand patch at the back on the waistband, two insert pockets with a patch pocket inside the right insert pocket in front and two patch pockets at the back with stitched detail Material and Care 98% cotton and 2% spandex Wash in cold water Do not bleach or tumble dry Use warm iron Size and Fit Aza Slim fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
